chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The utilization of the world upon (attaining) the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/14)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/14)
text: سَلُوا اللَّهَ الْغِنَى فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْعَافِيَةَ وَ فِي الْآخِرَةِ الْمَغْفِرَةَ وَ الْجَنَّةَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Sa’alba Bin Maymoun, from Abdul Al A’ala,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Ask Allah<sup>azwj</sup> for the ease in the world and the health, and regarding the Hereafter, the Forgiveness and the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn Faddal from Tha’labah ibn Maymun from ‘Abd al-‘Ala’ who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Ask Allah to grant you (financial) self-sufficiency and good health in this world, forgiveness and paradise in the hereafter.’”
